sector.name_zh: 电路板与 PCB 标签
sector.subhead_en: Traceability labels matched to each PCB process — from reflow and aggressive wash to finished-board identification.
sector.subhead_zh: 按 PCB 工序匹配的可追溯标签 —— 从回流焊、强力清洗到成品板标识。
sector.intro_en: PCB labels are organised by process: where the label is applied, what it must survive and the recommended material. Products are available under three series — Polyonics APEX, Polyonics XF and E-Label — the same construction under each identity.
sector.intro_zh: PCB 标签按工序组织:标签贴在哪里、必须承受什么、推荐哪种材料。产品提供三个系列 —— Polyonics APEX、Polyonics XF 与 E-Label —— 同一材料,三种标识。

processes.overview_en: The most demanding process: the label is applied to a bare or in-process board and passes through the reflow oven and aggressive aqueous wash — polyimide territory.
processes.overview_zh: 最苛刻的工序:标签贴在裸板或在制板上,穿过回流焊炉和强碱水洗,必须用聚酰亚胺
processes.challenge_en: Survive 260–330 °C multiple reflow passes and strong Kyzen/Zestron cleaning with no smearing or lifting, keeping small text and dense barcodes scannable.
processes.challenge_zh: 承受 260-330℃ 多次回流,以及 Kyzen/Zestron 强力清洗,印字不糊、标签不翘,小字与密集条码保持可读

products.spec_zh: 2mil 加厚亮光白;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗表层;-70~100℃;UL/MIL;无需打印预热
products.spec_en: 2mil heavy gloss white; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant topcoat; -70~100℃; UL/MIL; no print pre-heat

products.spec_zh: 1mil 亮光白;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗涂层;无需预热;UL/MIL 认证;热转印
products.spec_en: 1mil gloss white; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant coating; no pre-heat; UL/MIL; thermal transfer

products.spec_zh: 1mil 最耐高温白色特种 PI;无 ESD;短时耐 300℃;R4300 碳带满足 SAE AS81530;超耐久高温胶;正反面通用
products.spec_en: 1mil highest-temp white specialty PI; non-ESD; 300℃ short-term; R4300 ribbon meets SAE AS81530; ultra-durable high-temp adhesive; dual-side

products.spec_zh: 2mil 最耐高温白色特种 PI;无 ESD;短时耐 300℃;R4300 碳带满足 SAE AS81531;超耐久高温胶;正反面通用
products.spec_en: 2mil highest-temp white specialty PI; non-ESD; 300℃ short-term; R4300 ribbon meets SAE AS81531; ultra-durable high-temp adhesive; dual-side

products.spec_zh: 2mil 哑光白 PI;无 ESD;-70~100℃;UL、MIL;热转印
products.spec_en: 2mil matte white PI; non-ESD; -70~100℃; UL/MIL; thermal transfer

processes.overview_en: Applied after reflow; the board still goes through repeated aggressive washing but no longer sees reflow heat — the same materials as Wash & Reflow.
processes.overview_zh: 回流后贴,板子仍要过多次强力清洗,但不再经受回流热,与回流工序同款材料
processes.challenge_en: Withstand repeated aggressive washing and moderate heat with no pre-heat, keeping print legible — without paying for capability this process never uses.
processes.challenge_zh: 免预热下承受反复强力清洗和中等热,保持印字可读,不为用不到的能力买单

products.spec_zh: 2mil 加厚亮光白;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗表层;-70~100℃;UL/MIL;无需打印预热
products.spec_en: 2mil heavy gloss white; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant topcoat; -70~100℃; UL/MIL; no print pre-heat

products.spec_zh: 1mil 亮光白;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗涂层;无需预热;UL/MIL 认证;热转印
products.spec_en: 1mil gloss white; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant coating; no pre-heat; UL/MIL; thermal transfer

processes.overview_en: Applied after all soldering, cleaning and reflow — the final identity on a finished board or assembly. No reflow heat, so no need for 300 °C polyimide.
processes.overview_zh: 在所有焊接、清洗、回流完成后贴,成品板/组件的最终标识,不再需要极端耐热的聚酰亚胺
processes.challenge_en: ESD-safe, thin and low-cost — without over-engineering with heat resistance the process never uses.
processes.challenge_zh: ESD 安全、薄、低成本,不为用不到的耐热能力买单

products.spec_zh: 阻燃聚酯;UL94 V-0 阻燃、自熄;电池环境安全;2mil
products.spec_en: Flame-retardant polyester; UL94 V-0, self-extinguishing; battery-safe; 2mil

products.spec_zh: 后处理聚酯;医疗设备级、耐磨耐擦、永久标识;2mil 光面白;-40~180℃;UL 969
products.spec_en: Post-process polyester; medical-grade, abrasion-resistant, permanent; 2mil gloss white; -40~180℃; UL 969

products.spec_zh: 后处理 ESD 聚酯;ESD 防静电、医疗级、UL 认证;2mil 光面白;-40~180℃;UL 969
products.spec_en: Post-process ESD polyester; ESD-safe, medical-grade, UL; 2mil gloss white; -40~180℃; UL 969

products.spec_zh: 超薄聚酯;超薄微型、成本优化、微型设备专用;1mil;-40~85℃
products.spec_en: Ultra-thin polyester; compact, cost-optimised, for micro devices; 1mil; -40~85℃

products.spec_zh: 彩色 ESD 聚酯;彩色快速分类、耐液氮耐化学;光面彩色
products.spec_en: Colour ESD polyester; colour sorting, LN2- and chemical-resistant; gloss colour
